name: The First National Bank and Trust Co., Chickasha, Oklahoma
description_short: Community bank in Chickasha, Oklahoma offering personal and business banking, mortgages, trust services, and card products since 1892.
description_long: The First National Bank and Trust Company is a regional bank headquartered in Chickasha, Oklahoma with a 130+ year operating history dating back to 1892. The institution positions itself as a community-focused financial institution dedicated to building local economic life and business relationships. The bank serves both personal and business customers through a comprehensive suite of traditional banking services. FNBT offers personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, personal loans, mortgage lending, and card services including debit cards, credit cards, and ATM access. On the business side, they provide business checking and savings, business loans, business credit cards, merchant services, and online banking platforms designed specifically for small business management. The bank also offers specialized trust services including estate planning, estate settlement, charitable giving administration, oil and gas management, and investment management services. The bank distinguishes itself through deep community roots, specialized trust services for estate and investment planning, and oil and gas management capabilities that reflect regional economic focus. They provide access to the Allpoint Network of over 55,000 surcharge-free ATMs globally, modernizing their service delivery beyond traditional branch banking. Their emphasis on "empowering small business" suggests targeted support for entrepreneurial customers in their market. As a regional community bank, FNBT operates with traditional banking strengths in relationship-based service and local decision-making, but likely lacks the digital innovation, product breadth, and national reach of larger institutions. The website provides limited information on specific loan terms, rates, fees, or minimum balance requirements, making direct comparison with competitors difficult for prospective customers.
services: Trust services (estate planning, estate settlement, charitable giving, oil & gas management, investment management)
pros: 130+ year history (established 1892) provides institutional stability and deep community roots
Access to 55,000+ Allpoint Network surcharge-free ATMs worldwide
Specialized trust services including estate planning, charitable giving, and oil & gas management
Dedicated small business banking focus with merchant services and business credit cards
Online banking platforms available for both personal and business customers
Personal mortgage lending with multiple loan type options
Wide card service offerings including debit, credit, ATM, and Team Spirit cards
cons: Limited geographic footprint as regional Oklahoma bank may restrict accessibility for non-local customers
Website lacks transparency on loan rates, APRs, account fees, or minimum balance requirements
No information provided about digital banking capabilities, mobile app features, or fintech integrations
Unclear whether they serve customers outside Oklahoma region or primarily local markets
Limited details on business loan terms, SBA loan offerings, or equipment financing specifics
best_for: Oklahoma residents and businesses seeking community-based banking with personal service
Small business owners needing merchant services, business loans, and business banking support
Individuals planning estates who need professional trust and wealth management services
diagnosis: FNBT is best suited for Oklahoma-based individuals and small business owners seeking traditional community banking with personalized service and specialized trust/wealth management capabilities. Primary caveat: the bank's regional focus and lack of transparent rate/fee information online makes it essential for prospective customers to contact them directly for competitive comparison before opening accounts or applying for loans.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: The First National Bank and Trust Co., Chickasha, Oklahoma
